title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 13–16, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He Deliber- Ately blocked it with his body....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: If the bullet had hit the enemy, those two might have...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: changed their target and attacked us

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Maybe he's trying to protect us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then, what do you think we can do...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He still has time to think about stuff like that...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If only I had one more sword

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I have to get his Katanas back!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If I can get zero his Katanas, he will definitely win!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: In that case, let me go!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't overdo it, you're badly hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If only I can pass him the Katanas....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What are doing with those Katanas?

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
